func (p *Shared) extractLabels(container dockerData) (configuration, error) {
	providerConfig := configuration{}

	providerConfig.LoadBalancer.Servers = append(providerConfig.LoadBalancer.Servers, container.Servers...)
	providerConfig.LoadBalancer.PassHostHeader = container.PassHostHeader
	providerConfig.LoadBalancer.ResponseForwarding = container.ResponseForwarding

	providerConfig.Middleware = container.Middleware
	providerConfig.TCPMiddleware = container.TCPMiddleware
	providerConfig.UDPMiddleware = container.UDPMiddleware

	providerConfig.Routers = append(providerConfig.Routers, container.Routers...)
	providerConfig.Services = append(providerConfig.Services, container.Services...)

	if container.Labels != nil {
		providerConfig.LoadBalancer.Labels = container.Labels[labelDockerComposeService]
		providerConfig.Middleware.Labels = container.Labels[labelDockerComposeService]
		providerConfig.TCPMiddleware.Labels = container.Labels[labelDockerComposeService]
		providerConfig.UDPMiddleware.Labels = container.Labels[labelDockerComposeService]
		providerConfig.Routers.Labels = container.Labels[labelDockerComposeProject]
		providerConfig.Services.Labels = container.Labels[labelDockerComposeService]
	}

	return providerConfig, nil
}

func (p *Shared) extractLabels(container dockerData) (configuration, error) {
	providerConfig := configuration{}

	providerConfig.LoadBalancer.Servers = append(providerConfig.LoadBalancer.Servers, container.Servers...)
	providerConfig.LoadBalancer.PassHostHeader = container.PassHostHeader
	providerConfig.LoadBalancer.ResponseForwarding = container.ResponseForwarding

	providerConfig.Middleware = container.Middleware
	providerConfig.TCPMiddleware = container.TCPMiddleware
	providerConfig.UDPMiddleware = container.UDPMiddleware

	providerConfig.Routers = append(providerConfig.Routers, container.Routers...)
	providerConfig.Services = append(providerConfig.Services, container.Services...)

	if container.Labels != nil {
		providerConfig.LoadBalancer.Labels = container.Labels[labelDockerComposeService]
		providerConfig.Middleware.Labels = container.Labels[labelDockerComposeService]
		providerConfig.TCPMiddleware.Labels = container.Labels[labelDockerComposeService]
		providerConfig.UDPMiddleware.Labels = container.Labels[labelDockerComposeService]
		providerConfig.Routers.Labels = container.Labels[labelDockerComposeProject]
		providerConfig.Services.Labels = container.Labels[labelDockerComposeService]
	}

	return providerConfig, nil
}
